calendar.matters:
Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, Motion For Contempt is taken off calendar. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Continued To Apr-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Telephonic Appearance:
Kevin Wallace, Esq., for petitioner and moving party: Kellie Little
Nicholas Johnson, respondent in Propria Persona

After hearing, the matter is continued to April 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. for Status Report on Motion For Contempt, clerk to send notice of continuance; parties may appear by telephone. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Continued To Mar-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
KEVIN J. WALLACE, ESQ., (415)956-8400, FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY KELLIE LITTLE
NICHOLAS JOHNSON, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)828-9628, RESPONDENT/OPPOSING PARTY

HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE CONTEMPT. THE MATTER IS ORDERED CONTINUED TO MARCH 25, 2009 AT 9:00 AM FOR STATUS REPORT. THE PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY PHONE TO ADVISE THE COURT WHETHER THE MOTION SHOULD BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR OR WHETHER THE DEPOSITION OF THE THIRD PARTY SHOULD RESUME. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Continued To Feb-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, Hearing on order to show cause.
The hearing is continued to February 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. per agreement of parties. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Continued To Jan-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kevin Wallace, Esq., for petitioner: Kellie Little
Michelle Reed, Esq., for non party: Marzia Johnson
Nicholas Johnson, respondent in Propria Persona
(Court reporter was present but not card was provided)

After hearing, the hearing on order to show cause re: contempt is continued to January 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 610.
Plaintiff's memorandum by 1/5; defendant's opposition by 1/9.
Commissioner: Bruce Chan.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt

Michelle Reed, Esq., for non party: Marzia Johnson
Nicholas Johnson, respondent in Propria Persona

After hearing, Order to show cause re: contempt is continued to December 16, 2008 at 2:00 p.m. in Dept. 610, per stipulation of parties. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
